title: IoT Wireless Pager System
description: Created an ESP32-based IoT pager for real-time alerts with cloud connectivity, designed for use in time-critical scenarios requiring instant wireless communication.

title: Drone-Based Friend/Foe Detection
description: Built a real-time object detection system using OpenCV to classify aerial targets as Friend or Foe based on shape recognition algorithms.

title: Line-Following Mini Drone Prototype
description: Developed an autonomous mini drone with onboard vision and control systems for line tracking and stable flight in GPS-denied environments.

title: GPS Tracker PCB Module (STM-32)
description: Designed and assembled a 4-layered GPS Tracker PCB using KiCad for reliable, compact, and efficient location tracking applications.

title: Home Load Automation (ESP-32)
description: Designed and deployed an IoT-based solution for automated control of home electrical loads, leveraging ESP-32 for wireless operation and smart scheduling of connected devices.

title: FM Transmitter & Receiver Module
description: Built an analog FM transceiver module on Vero board by hand-soldering components, demonstrating practical understanding of RF modulation and reception circuits.
